note: Docker validation could not be executed because Bash invocations in this harness fail with 'permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env' before any user command runs. However, only instruction.md was modified; tests/, solution/solve.sh, and environment/Dockerfile are untouched, so nop_reward (built from the unchanged Dockerfile) and gold_reward (built from the unchanged solve.sh applied to the unchanged Dockerfile) are structurally identical to the pre-edit values. Tests grep the source file at /workspace/ClickHouse/src/Functions/padString.cpp, not instruction.md, so instruction edits cannot influence the oracle. The rewrite reframes the previously prescriptive directives ('Use PaddedPODArray<UInt8>', 'use insertFromItself()', etc.) as bug symptom + acceptance criteria the resulting source must satisfy, addressing no_solution_leakage and instruction_no_hint_leakage while keeping every literal string the tests assert on (required by the 'every asserted specific must be recoverable' rule, since tests are textual greps). The remaining Tier-A failures (solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text) are test-design issues outside the scope of an instruction-only reconcile.
